This is a generated file belonging to the `ctf-info-block` module of the marketing web app template built on Next.js. As a React Component, it is part of the auto-generated layer typically produced from GraphQL codegen tooling, which suggests that `ctf-info-block` corresponds to a content type modeled in Contentful, with this file responsible for rendering or supporting the rendering of that content type within the marketing site.

The component depends on the `ctf-asset` module, pulling in shared GraphQL fragment types and documents that describe asset fields (such as images or media referenced by the info block). This indicates that an info block can include or display an associated asset, and it relies on the asset module's generated fragment to type and query that asset data consistently across the codebase.

# Relations

- [Ctf Asset.Generated](ctf-asset.generated.md) — Includes asset data for images or media shown in the info block {kind: sync}
